commands.name: agent
commands.description: Executes Meissa in --testAgent mode. When Meissa is started in this mode it will wait for test run commands from test runners connected to the same test execution server.

options.name: --server
options.description:
The test server URL with port that will be used by the
test agents and runners to communicate between the
machines.

options.name: --tag
options.description:
Required. The tag will be used to control the test agent
remotely and to build a group of test agents. This way you
will be able to run a specific set of tests to a group of
your test agents.

options.name: --runTimeout
options.description:
The time in minutes after which the test agent run will be
stopped.

options.name: --restarted
options.description: Used for internal purposes only.

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

options.name: --server
options.description:
The test server URL with port that will be used by the test
agents and runners to communicate between the machines.

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

commands.name: dump
commands.description: Creates a file dump of the test execution logs from all test agents.

options.name: --path
options.description: Specifies the dump file's location.

options.name: --server
options.description:
The test server URL with port that will be used by the test
agents and runners to communicate between the machines.

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

commands.name: initServer
commands.description: Set up Meissa test execution server that will be used by all test runners and agents for communication and storing data.

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

commands.name: runner
commands.description: Executes Meissa in --runner mode. You need to pass all native runner arguments using the argument nativeRunnerArguments.

options.name: --results
options.description:
Required. The path to the file where all
results will be stored.

options.name: --library
options.description: Required. The path to the tests' library file.

options.name: --tag
options.description:
Required. The test agents' tag used to filter
the machines where the tests will be executed.

options.name: --testTechnology
options.description:
The tests technology that will be used to
execute the tests- MSTest, NUnit, etc.

options.name: --nativeRunnerArguments
options.description:
The native runner arguments that we use in
addition to Meissa arguments. (e.g. MSTest

options.name: --server
options.description:
The test server URL with port that will be used
by the test agents and runners to communicate
between the machines.

options.name: --runTimeout
options.description:
The time in minutes after which the test run
will be stopped.

options.name: --filter
options.description:
The filter that will be applied to the whole
set of tests.

options.name: --parallelRun
options.description:
Specifies whether the tests will be run in
parallel on the test agent machine.

options.name: --maxCount
options.description:
Specifies the maximum count of parallel test
run processes. The default one is equal to the
machines' CPU cores count.

options.name: --timeBased
options.description:
Specifies whether the tests will be distributed
based on previous execution times.

options.name: --sameMachineByClass
options.description:
Specifies whether the tests from the same class
will be executed on the same machine. The
default is false.

options.name: --customArguments
options.description:
Key value pairs. The first parameter will be
the name of the environment variable holding
the second one as value.

options.name: --retries
options.description:
How many times the failed tests will be
retried.

options.name: --threshold
options.description:
If the percentage of the failed tests is bigger
than the specified threshold %, no next reruns
will be performed.

options.name: --retriedResults
options.description:
The path to the file where all retied results
will be stored.

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

commands.name: setServerUrl
commands.description: Sets test execution server URL so that you are not prompt for the URL every time.

options.name: --server
options.description:
The test server URL with port that will be used by the test
agents and runners to communicate between the machines.

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

commands.name: status
commands.description: Displays the status of the test agents with a specific tag.

options.name: --tag
options.description:
Required. The status of the test agents with this tag will be
displayed.

options.name: --server
options.description:
The test server URL with port that will be used by the test
agents and runners to communicate between the machines.

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.
